# Beudox HR Portal - Technical Context

## Architecture Overview

This is a modern React TypeScript frontend application built with Vite, serving as the user interface for a comprehensive HR management system. The app follows a component-based architecture with feature-organized directory structure.

## Technology Stack

- **Framework**: React 18 with TypeScript
- **Build System**: Vite with SWC compiler
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui component system
- **Backend**: Supabase (PostgreSQL + Auth + Edge Functions)
- **Routing**: React Router v6
- **State Management**: React hooks + Supabase real-time subscriptions
- **Testing**: Vitest (unit) + Playwright (e2e)

## Application Structure

### Routing Architecture

The application uses React Router with a pages-based structure:
- `src/pages/Index.tsx` - Main application entry point
- Additional pages in `src/pages/` for specific routes
- Layout components handle navigation and authentication

### Component Organization

Components are organized by feature domains:

- **Layout Components** (`src/components/layout/`):
  - `AppLayout.tsx` - Main application shell with sidebar
  - `AppSidebar.tsx` - Navigation sidebar
  - `TopBar.tsx` - Top navigation bar
  - `UserMenu.tsx` - User dropdown menu
  - `NotificationBell.tsx` - Notification indicator

- **UI Components** (`src/components/ui/`):
  - Complete shadcn/ui component library (50+ components)
  - Consistent design system with Radix UI primitives
  - Accessible and customizable components

- **Feature Components**:
  - `attendance/` - Attendance tracking and upload
  - `employee-profile/` - Employee detail views
  - `leave/` - Leave request management
  - `payroll/` - Payroll processing
  - `finance/` - Financial summaries
  - `evaluations/` - Performance reviews
  - `projects/` - Project management
  - `settings/` - System configuration
  - `profile/` - User profile management

### Key Components Analysis

#### AttendanceUploadFlow (`src/components/attendance/AttendanceUploadFlow.tsx`)
- Complex multi-step file upload component
- Handles Excel file parsing with SheetJS library
- AI-powered data normalization via Supabase Edge Function
- Preview and validation of attendance records
- Batch import with conflict resolution
- Supports ZKTeco biometric device exports

#### MandatoryPasswordChange (`src/components/MandatoryPasswordChange.tsx`)
- Modal component for forced password changes
- Real-time password strength validation
- Integrates with Supabase Auth
- Updates employee profile flags
- Handles session refresh and navigation

#### SearchableEmployeeSelect (`src/components/SearchableEmployeeSelect.tsx`)
- Reusable employee selection component
- Command palette interface with search
- Avatar display with fallback initials
- Supports "All Employees" option
- Keyboard navigation and accessibility

## Data Flow & State Management

### Authentication Flow
- Supabase Auth handles login/logout
- Custom `useAuth` hook manages user state
- Automatic token refresh and session management
- Role-based access control with `canAccess` and `hasRole` utilities

### Data Fetching
- Direct Supabase client usage in components
- Real-time subscriptions for live updates
- Optimistic updates for better UX
- Error handling with toast notifications

### Business Logic

Located in `src/lib/`:
- `role-access.ts` - Permission checking utilities
- `review-schedule.ts` - Performance review scheduling
- `leave-utils.ts` - Leave balance calculations
- `attendance-format.ts` - Time and date formatting
- `client-activity.ts` - Activity logging and categorization
- `notifications.ts` - Notification sending logic

## Configuration & Environment

### Build Configuration
- `vite.config.ts` - Vite build setup
- `tsconfig.*.json` - TypeScript configurations
- `tailwind.config.ts` - Tailwind CSS customization
- `eslint.config.js` - Code linting rules

### Environment Variables
- Supabase project configuration
- Public keys for client-side usage
- Build-time environment injection

## Database Integration

### Supabase Schema
The application interacts with a comprehensive HR database including:
- Employee management (profiles, documents, salaries)
- Attendance tracking (records, imports, calculations)
- Leave management (requests, balances, approvals)
- Payroll processing (calculations, overtime, taxes)
- Performance reviews (schedules, evaluations, feedback)
- Company settings (policies, configurations)

### Edge Functions
- `parse-attendance-ai` - AI-powered Excel parsing
- `invite-employee` - User invitation system
- `generate-payroll` - Automated payroll calculation
- `send-notification` - Notification delivery

## Development Workflow

### Code Quality
- TypeScript for type safety
- ESLint for code consistency
- Prettier for code formatting
- Husky for git hooks

### Testing Strategy
- Unit tests with Vitest
- E2E tests with Playwright
- Component testing with React Testing Library

### Deployment
- Built with Vite for optimized production bundles
- Static hosting compatible (Vercel, Netlify, etc.)
- Environment-specific builds

## Key Patterns & Conventions

### Component Patterns
- Functional components with hooks
- Custom hooks for shared logic
- Compound component patterns for complex UIs
- Consistent prop interfaces with TypeScript

### Styling Patterns
- Utility-first with Tailwind CSS
- CSS custom properties for theming
- Responsive design with mobile-first approach
- Consistent spacing and typography scales

### Error Handling
- Try-catch blocks with user-friendly messages
- Toast notifications for feedback
- Loading states for async operations
- Graceful degradation for failed requests

## Performance Considerations

- Code splitting with Vite
- Lazy loading for routes and components
- Optimized bundle size with tree shaking
- Efficient re-renders with React.memo where appropriate
- Database query optimization with Supabase

## Security

- Client-side authentication with Supabase
- Row Level Security (RLS) policies in database
- Input validation and sanitization
- Secure environment variable handling
- CORS and CSP headers in production
